response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with over 20 years in web, mobile, and full-stack development. However, his background does not align with the core requirements of a Principal Performance Architect. He lacks the necessary specialized experience in SoC and IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, and performance optimization for AI accelerators and deep learning workloads.
strengths: Meets the educational and tenure requirements with a BS in Computer Science and over 20 years of engineering experience.
Proven ability to build low-latency, high-throughput microservices and distributed systems.
Strong leadership and architectural experience as a Staff Engineer and open-source platform founder.
concerns: Complete lack of experience with SoC/IP modeling and hardware-software co-design.
No background in GPU architecture, AI accelerators, or SIMD/MIMD systems.
Missing required expertise in deep-learning workload performance analysis and optimization.
